change.final_action: Rejected and code/test changes reverted after prompt verifier failed.
change.summary: Candidate changed selected dual Q4_K WMMA compact prefill default tile from 32x16 to 16x16 while keeping env overrides and registry keys unchanged.

checks.name: primary gate
checks.result: Stable IDs 220/570 and flat memory; candidate primary min decode 114.999304 tok/s.

checks.name: prompt verifier
checks.result: Mixed/regressive versus retained decode-policy cache baseline: 512 prefill improved 1958.536 -> 1965.114 tok/s and 4K decode was flat/slightly up 114.991 -> 114.999 tok/s, but 4K prefill regressed 2292.684 -> 2288.047 tok/s and 512 decode regressed 127.263 -> 126.910 tok/s.
